brief: US military actions escalate against Iran while domestic political divides deepen over Israel aid and a World Cup controversy erupts. Research advances explore multimodal emotion, graph databases, and human-AI teaming.
news_summary: US warships blockaded Iranian ports and launched fresh strikes as Trump warned Tehran; Argentina's World Cup celebration with a Falklands banner sparked criticism, while over 100 House Democrats voted to end military aid to Israel.
papers_summary: Papers present new systems for cross-domain emotion analysis (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), and platforms for human-AI teaming experiments (TRAIL), alongside studies on misinformation in low-resource languages and AI-assisted writing.

en.brief: US military actions escalate against Iran while domestic political divides deepen over Israel aid and a World Cup controversy erupts. Research advances explore multimodal emotion, graph databases, and human-AI teaming.
en.news_summary: US warships blockaded Iranian ports and launched fresh strikes as Trump warned Tehran; Argentina's World Cup celebration with a Falklands banner sparked criticism, while over 100 House Democrats voted to end military aid to Israel.
en.papers_summary: Papers present new systems for cross-domain emotion analysis (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), and platforms for human-AI teaming experiments (TRAIL), alongside studies on misinformation in low-resource languages and AI-assisted writing.

zh.brief: 今日中国焦点包括香港国安法下独立书店被查、地震学家被拘、经济增速放缓至4.3%，以及阿根廷队因福克兰群岛横幅面临处罚。国际方面，美国对伊朗实施海上封锁，AI泡沫论文引发讨论。
zh.news_summary: 香港国安处搜查两家独立书店并逮捕五人，涉嫌出售煽动刊物；地震学家陈友麟因间谍罪被拘近两年；中国二季度GDP增速降至4.3%创2022年底以来新低；阿根廷队因展示福克兰群岛主权横幅面临国际足联处罚。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无华语论文，但英文研究涉及多模态情感描述、图数据库可视化工具及AI助理在跨学科科学中的应用，同时一篇MIT论文探讨AI泡沫与投机增长。

todays_image.caption: Like the Tyrannosaurus rex defending its territory, the U.S. military's blockade of Iranian ports reasserts dominance after a fragile truce collapses.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
